DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET #1 AND #2 - NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 335 AND 311(C). THE COURT IS UNABLE TO CONSIDER THE MOTION WITHOUT A SEPARATE STATEMENT OF MATTERS IN DISPUTE SINCE AN UNVERIFIED RESPONSE CONTAINING BOTH ANSWERS AND OBJECTIONS IS EFFECTIVE TO PRESERVE SPECIFIED OBJECTIONS. IN ADDITION, THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 2023(C). THE DECLARATION DOES NOT SET FORTH SUFFICIENT FACTS SUPPORTING 17.67 HOURS FOR PREPARING THE MOTION, CONFERRING WITH COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT, AND RESPONDING TO THE OPPOSITION MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. (610/BCHAN)

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 AGAINST STANLEY G. HILTON, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-07-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-22-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
